zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Clere於1534年7月29日出生在英國艾可迪德哈姆時，他的父親John Clere30歲，母親Jane38歲。他於1560年與Sarah Anne Clinton在英國英格蘭艾可可爾斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1579年6月19日在英國艾可可爾斯特享年44歲，埋葬在英國艾可可爾斯特聖 波托爾福也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Clere于1534年7月29日出生在英国艾可迪德哈姆时，他的父亲John Clere30岁，母亲Jane38岁。他于1560年与Sarah Anne Clinton在英国英格兰艾可可爾斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1579年6月19日在英国艾可可爾斯特享年44岁，埋葬在英国艾可可爾斯特聖 波托爾福也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Clere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Clear
meanings: English (southeastern England, of Norman origin): from Clere, the French popular form of the personal name Clare 2, and possibly interchangeable with it or confused with it.

English (southeastern): probably a habitational name from clere, a component of several placenames in north Hampshire (Highclere, Burghclere, Kingsclere). This is probably from a Celtic stream name meaning ‘bright’ (cognate with Latin clarus ‘clear, bright’).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Klar   1.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Clere was born on 29 July 1534, in Dedham, Essex, England, his father, John Clere, was 30 and his mother, Jane, was 38. He married Sarah Anne Clinton in 1560, in Colchester, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 19 June 1579, in Colchester, Essex, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in St Botolph's Church, Colchester, Essex, England.

fr.Colchester, Colchester Borough, Essex, E: St Botolph's Church, Colchester, Essex, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Clere est né le 29 juillet 1534, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John Clere, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Jane, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Anne Clinton en 1560, à Colchester, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 19 juin 1579, à Colchester, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à St Botolph's Church, Colchester, Essex, Angleterre.

de.Colchester, Colchester Borough, Essex, E: St Botolph's Church, Colchester, Essex, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Clere am 29. Juli 1534 in Dedham, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Clere 30 und seine Mutter Jane 38. Er hat 1560 in Colchester, Essex, England, United Kingdom Sarah Anne Clinton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Juni 1579 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Colchester, Essex, England und wurde in St Botolph's Church, Colchester, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Clere è nato il il 29 luglio 1534 nel Dedham, Essex, England, il suo padre, John Clere, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Jane, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Anne Clinton nel 1560, nel Colchester, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 19 giugno 1579, nel Colchester, Essex, England, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a St Botolph's Church, Colchester, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Clereが1534年7月29日にイギリスエセックスデドハムで生まれた時，父John Clereは30歳，母Janeは38歳であった。1560年にイギリスイギリスエセックスコルチェスターでSarah Anne Clintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1579年6月19日にイギリスエセックスコルチェスターで44歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスコルチェスタースト ボトルフ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Colchester, Colchester Borough, Essex, E: 영국 에세스 코체스터 스트 벗프'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Clere(이)가 1534년 7월 29일 영국 에세스 데드함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Clere(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1560년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 코체스터에서 Sarah Anne Clinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1579년 6월 19일 영국 에세스 코체스터에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 코체스터 스트 벗프'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Clere nasceu em 29 de julho de 1534, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Clere, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Jane, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Anne Clinton em 1560, em Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de junho de 1579, em Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em St Botolph's Church, Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.Colchester, Colchester Borough, Essex, E: ст ботолф'с чурч, колчестир, эссекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Clere родился 29 июля 1534 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Clere было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Anne Clinton в 1560 г. в местности колчестир, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 19 июня 1579 г. в местности колчестир, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности ст ботолф'с чурч, колчестир, эссекс, Англия.
